message:
fix(time): CAS loop for BrowserMonotonicClock pending catch-up accumulator

Replace load/store pair on pending_catch_up_ns with a
compare_exchange_weak CAS loop to prevent TOCTOU races when
multiple threads call on_host_sample() concurrently. The prior
code loaded pending, computed combined_delta, then stored the
result — but another thread could modify pending between the
load and store, causing lost or duplicated catch-up nanoseconds.

Now both the jitter-floor early return path and the advance path
use CAS to atomically update pending_catch_up_ns, retrying on
contention. This ensures the accumulated pending value is always
consistent even under concurrent time advancement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
